description:
The setlist.fm API has been designed to give you easy access to setlist data in order to build fancy websites and other applications. Before starting to use the API, be sure to ...

  1. ... understand how setlist.fm works (the FAQ and the Guidelines are a good starting point),
  2. ... read this documentation carefully and
  3. ... apply for an API key (link for logged in users only) - if you're no registered user yet, then register first (it's free).

If this documentation isn't enough or if you've got other things you'd like to tell us about the API, visit the API Forum.

Note that the setlist.fm API is, according to the API terms of service, only free for non-commercial projects. If you're interested in using the API for commercial purposes, contact us.

About this Service

This service provides methods to get both setlists and components of setlists such as artists, cities, countries or venues.

Supported Content Types

The REST service currently supports XML (default) and JSON content.

To receive a JSON response, set the Accept header to application/json.

Internationalization

(Please note that this is an experimental feature and does not work for all cities!)

Most of the featured methods honor the Accept-Language header. This header is used for localizing cities and countries. The default language is English (en), but you can provide any of the languages Spanish (es), French (fr), German (de), Portuguese (pt), Turkish (tr), Italian (it) or Polish (pl).

E.g. if you search a setlist for a concert that took place in Vienna and you pass "de" as header, you'll get "Wien, Österreich" instead of "Vienna, Austria".
This also works if you use a different language than the country's native language.

E.g. for a concert in New York, you'll get "Nueva York, Estados Unidos" instead of "New York, United States" if you pass "es" as language.

API Keys

API keys (application form) must be included in the request with the x-api-key header.

Version History

Version Docs End of Service
1.0 Docs -
0.1 December 31, 2017

tools.name: 1-0_resource-artist-mbid-get-artist-get
tools.description:
Returns an artist for a given Musicbrainz MBID

. Required: mbid.

tools.name: 1-0_resource-artist-mbid-setlists-get-artist-setlists-get
tools.description:
Get a list of an artist's setlists.

. Required: mbid. Optional: p.

params.name: mbid
params.description: the Musicbrainz MBID of the artist

params.name: p
params.description: the number of the result page

tools.name: 1-0_resource-city-geo-id-get-city-get
tools.description: Get a city by its unique geoId. Required: geoId.

tools.name: 1-0_resource-search-artists-get-artists-get
tools.description: Search for artists. Optional: artistMbid, artistName, artistTmid (plus 2 more).

params.name: p
params.description: the number of the result page you'd like to have

params.name: sort
params.description: the sort of the result, either sortName (default) or relevance

tools.name: 1-0_resource-search-cities-get-cities-get
tools.description: Search for a city. Optional: country, name, p (plus 2 more).

params.name: p
params.description: the number of the result page you'd like to have

params.name: stateCode
params.description: state code the city lies in

tools.name: 1-0_resource-search-countries-get-countries-get
tools.description: Get a complete list of all supported countries.

tools.name: 1-0_resource-search-setlists-get-setlists-get
tools.description: Search for setlists. Optional: artistMbid, artistName, artistTmid (plus 13 more).

params.name: date
params.description: the date of the event (format dd-MM-yyyy)

params.name: lastUpdated
params.description: the date and time (UTC) when this setlist was last updated (format yyyyMMddHHmmss) - either edited or reverted. search will return setlists that were updated on or after this date

params.name: p
params.description: the number of the result page

tools.name: 1-0_resource-search-venues-get-venues-get
tools.description: Search for venues. Optional: cityId, cityName, country (plus 4 more).

params.name: cityName
params.description: name of the city where the venue is located

params.name: p
params.description: the number of the result page you'd like to have

tools.name: 1-0_resource-setlist-setlist-id-get-setlist-get
tools.description:
Returns the current version of a setlist. E.g. if you pass the id of a setlist that got edited since you last accessed it, you'll get the current version.

. Required: setlistId.

tools.name: 1-0_resource-setlist-version-version-id-get-setlist-version-get
tools.description:
Deprecated - always returns Not Found (404)

Returns a setlist for the given versionId. The setlist returned isn't necessarily the most recent version. E.g. if you pass the versionId of a setlist that got edited since you last accessed it, you'll get the same version as last time.

. Required: versionId.

tools.name: 1-0_resource-user-user-id-attended-get-user-attended-setlists-get
tools.description:
Get a list of setlists of concerts attended by a user.

. Required: userId. Optional: p.

params.name: p
params.description: the number of the result page

tools.name: 1-0_resource-user-user-id-edited-get-user-edited-setlists-get
tools.description:
Get a list of setlists of concerts edited by a user. The list contains the current version, not the version edited.

. Required: userId. Optional: p.

params.name: p
params.description: the number of the result page

tools.name: 1-0_resource-user-user-id-get-user-get
tools.description: Get a user by userId. (deprecated) Note: This endpoint always returns a result, even if the user doesn't exist. Required: userId.

tools.name: 1-0_resource-venue-venue-id-get-venue-get
tools.description: Get a venue by its unique id. Required: venueId.

tools.name: 1-0_resource-venue-venue-id-setlists-get-venue-setlists-get
tools.description:
Get setlists for a specific venue.

. Required: venueId. Optional: p.

params.name: p
params.description: the number of the result page
